---
name: NCS Naming Folder Taxonomy Contract
description: Use when creating, renaming, or moving NCS components, Data resources, and scenes. Enforce consistent naming, canonical folder placement, and predictable discoverability.
---
# NCS Naming Folder Taxonomy Contract

## Cross-References
- Refer to `godot-expert-workflow.instructions.md` and applicable scoped companion instructions for precedence and details.

## Naming Rule
- Use descriptive, responsibility-first names.
- Keep component names behavior-specific and data names domain-specific.
- Avoid ambiguous suffixes that do not indicate role.

## Folder Placement Rule
- Place reusable behavior under NCS component paths.
- Place configuration and schema-like resources under NCS data paths.
- Keep prototype/test assets outside core NCS paths unless promoted.

## Consistency Rule
- Follow existing local naming conventions unless a clearly better convention is adopted consistently.
